name: sophies-world
description: Jostein Gaarder's Sophie's World — a novel that is also a complete history of Western philosophy, inviting readers to wonder, question, and think for themselves.
useCase: Starting philosophy, confronting life's big questions, thinking for yourself, history of ideas, recovering wonder, questioning reality.
knownRisks: The novel covers Western philosophy only — other philosophical traditions are not included
Some simplifications are made for accessibility
The frame narrative can be confusing for some readers
